displayName: Portable (strictest common denominator of all verified profiles)
source: computed: intersection of anthropic + openai + gemini (each verified)
notes: Pre-computed strictest-common-denominator so a server author can lint for 'works on every major provider' without naming each one (`--portable`). Name: no dots (Anthropic + OpenAI forbid), no leading digit (Gemini forbids), <=64 chars. Schema: an OpenAPI-ish subset that survives Gemini's allowlist AND OpenAI strict mode simultaneously. The engine can also compute this intersection on the fly from `targets`; this file is the convenience default.
